title: One design, every site
description: The programme's single reference design, instantiated at every location.

steps.title: The reference design
steps.description: Built once, from an approved template version.
steps.voiceScript: The programme's reference design is built once, from a template version somebody approved.
steps.captionText: The programme's reference design is built once, from a template version somebody approved.
steps.fallbackMessage: The reference design: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Approve it
steps.description: Nothing is rolled out from an unapproved design.
steps.voiceScript: It must be approved before anything is rolled out. That approval is control C04, and it is checked again on the worker, not only here.
steps.captionText: It must be approved before anything is rolled out. That approval is control C04, and it is checked again on the worker, not only here.
steps.fallbackMessage: Approve it: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Roll it out
steps.description: Every qualified site is built from this one design.
steps.voiceScript: Rolling out queues the work. Every qualified site is then built as a copy of this design -- not redesigned, copied.
steps.captionText: Rolling out queues the work. Every qualified site is then built as a copy of this design -- not redesigned, copied.
steps.fallbackMessage: Roll it out: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The survey is evidence, not an input
steps.description: A site that differs raises a flag.
steps.voiceScript: A site whose survey disagrees with the reference does not get resized. It raises a variance flag for engineering. Otherwise you would have as many different bills of quantities as you have sites.
steps.captionText: A site whose survey disagrees with the reference does not get resized. It raises a variance flag for engineering. Otherwise you would have as many different bills of quantities as you have sites.
steps.fallbackMessage: The survey is evidence, not an input: not visible on this screen yet.
